title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Major banks are deploying Claude across their organizations. Anthropic held a virtual event featuring financial services leaders discussing their implementations.
writeup: This video covers a virtual event from Anthropic in which financial services leaders discuss how their organizations deploy Claude. It notes that major banks are rolling out the model across their operations. The key takeaway is firsthand accounts from financial services implementations, presented as part of Anthropic's "The Briefing" series.
